title: armeria maritima var. girardii
intro: Armeria maritima var. girardii, also known as sea thrift or pink thrift, is a flowering plant species in the primrose family with delicate pink flowers and a compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and inflammation, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. girardii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be made by steeping the dried flowers in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil.
